data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading. An electric unicycle wheel in dramatic three-quarter view, thick bold outlines, cel-shaded shadows. Urban alley backdrop with brick walls and fire escapes, wet pavement reflecting light. Muted palette with pops of electric blue from LED indicators on the wheel. Graphic novel panel composition, no rider visible. Gritty, stylized, hand-drawn comic book feel.
